verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I feel Your touch, I can feel Your heart, As I'm lying here, alone in the dark. I feel Your voice gently say, "Come to Me." I long for Your love as the earth longs for the rainfall. I'm weary - Lord, I've wandered this desert too long.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So come, living water, flow through me like a river, My heart's been thirsting so long. Flood through my soul, and pour out your mercy. Come, living water, fill me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lord, so many times You've called my name, And I've turned my face the other way. Yet before I even saw the womb, You loved me. How can I be so blind When I alone have created my darkness. Forgive me, and wash me clean again.
